code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut start = -1
while i <= n
  mut is_ws = true
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      else
        is_ws = false
      end
    when None
      is_ws = true
    end
  end
  if is_ws
    if start >= 0
      let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          count = count + 1
        end
      when None
      end
      start = -1
    end
  else
    if start < 0
      start = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("positive=#{count}")
